items.name: Graphic V-Neck Tee White Edition

Crisp white V-neck tee with contrasting black “LOS ANGELES” text, delicate SIUNES embroidery, and iconic star pendant details. The smooth fabric and bold graphics combine to create a clean, street-savvy aesthetic with a modern twist. Minimalist, sharp, and unapologetically stylish — ideal for versatile streetwear fits.
